evals.name: clamp-warmup-count
evals.prompt: You are working in `<PROJECT_ROOT>`. Add a `ClampWarmupCount` helper that clamps negative warmup counts to `0` and any value above `10` to `10`. Add a TS JIT regression test under `test/jittest/clamp_warmup_count/`, update any needed BUILD.gn files, update docs, and run the full devark workflow. Work on the current branch and do not create a new branch. If something is unclear, make the smallest reasonable assumption and record it in the plan instead of stopping to ask.
evals.expected_output: Plan/tasks are persisted, the helper and regression test are implemented, docs are updated, a commit exists, and build verification passes for `clamp_warmup_countJitAction`.
expectations: Plan and task tracker are persisted under `.agents/devark/`.
The task tracker reaches `done` or `completed` rather than staying pending or blocked.
`ClampWarmupCount` clamps negative values to 0 and values above 10 to 10.
A JIT regression test is created and registered in `test/jittest/BUILD.gn`.
A task-specific doc for the touched component is updated.
Build verification runs against `clamp_warmup_countJitAction` and succeeds.

evals.name: resume-normalize-tagged-value
evals.prompt: You are working in `<PROJECT_ROOT>`. Continue the unfinished devark task already tracked under `.agents/devark/`. Keep the existing task history unless it is clearly inconsistent. Finish the `NormalizeTaggedValue` change so negatives map to `0` and odd positive values round up to the next even value, update tests/docs, and complete the review/build flow. Work on the current branch. If anything is ambiguous, prefer a minimal assumption and continue.
evals.expected_output: Existing plan/tasks are reused, `NormalizeTaggedValue` is implemented with tests/docs, the task reaches `done`, a commit exists, and build verification passes for `normalize_tagged_valueJitAction`.
expectations: The existing `.agents/devark/` plan/task history is reused instead of abandoned.
`NormalizeTaggedValue` maps negatives to 0 and odd positives to the next even value.
The regression test files remain present and aligned with the new behavior.
A task-specific doc for `tagged_value_utils` is updated.
Build verification runs against `normalize_tagged_valueJitAction` and succeeds.
